files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 704fd13..529e4c0 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -335,2 +335,8 @@ Day 336 / Week 48 observations:
 - 876 new enterprise leads were reported; the query found 1,986 system-latest rows and the send call accepted 876, again matching the dashboard.
 - Week 48 adjustment: restore S2 C credit to $20, raise S2 A credit to $15, keep S2 B credit at $10, modestly increase ops to global $70k/day and S2 $200k/day plus S1 $5k/day, keep dev/ad spend paused, and hold A3/B3/C4 with large quotas.
+
+Day 343 / Week 49 observations:
+- Cash fell to $1.49M and subscribers dropped to 112,768. Churn spiked to 14,760, mostly S2 A (8,190) and S2 C (6,717). Open issues stayed high at 9,430.
+- Active base is now mostly S2 C (~85k) and S2 A (~28k); B is nearly gone. Retention should focus on A/C credits rather than broad B support.
+- 470 new enterprise leads were reported; send accepted 470 actionable threads. Enterprise still has 0 seats and should be ignored strategically except for mandatory responses.
+- Week 49 adjustment: deepen S2 credits to A=$25, B=$20, C=$30; trim support to global ops $60k/day and S2 ops $180k/day; pause dev/ads; move capacity down to tier 5 to preserve cash while usage averages below tier-5 capacity.
